description_long: This rifle features a robust, tactical design with a predominantly black metallic body accented by yellow highlights and a few exposed mechanical components. The weapon is equipped with a large, rectangular optical sight mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced targeting capabilities. The stock is angular and skeletonized, providing structural support while minimizing weight. The barrel is long and cylindrical, with a visible muzzle brake at the end to reduce recoil. A detachable box magazine is inserted beneath the receiver, and the rifle includes a pistol grip and several rails for accessory attachments. The overall construction appears modern and modular, suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A modern, black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, long barrel, optical sight, and yellow accents. Features include a box magazine, pistol grip, and accessory rails.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the skeletonized stock, optical sight, and yellow-accented components.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the muzzle brake, barrel opening, and the alignment of the optical sight above the receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, grip, and the detailed structure of the stock and sight.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure, the back of the optical sight, and the magazine's insertion point.
